provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, fast-talking middle eastern man in his 30s with a crooked smile and too many pockets, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit under an open supply department vest covered in pockets each stuffed with manifests data chits and small trade goods, a hand scanner on a wrist mount, lightweight running shoes instead of boots because he needs speed not grip, a personal comm device jury-rigged to scan cargo tags, he knows where everything is and what everything costs
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
